texto: Life in Britain had seemed like one long antechamber to a room that had too many barriers to entry
autor: here in the USA it seemed to be true that if you dared to give things 'your best shot' then the other much-used phrases like 'land of opportunity' would kick in as well.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a here in the USA it seemed to be true that if you dared to give things 'your best shot' then the other much-used phrases like 'land of opportunity' would kick in as well.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Life in Britain had seemed like one long antechamber to a room that had too many barriers to entry” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, christopher-hitchens, hitch-22-a-memoir pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de hitch-22-a-memoir.
